query:
UPDATE plugin_session_summaries
          SET client_source = CASE WHEN $2 != '' THEN $2 ELSE client_source END,
              model = CASE WHEN $3 != '' THEN $3 ELSE model END,
              permission_mode = CASE WHEN $4 != '' THEN $4 ELSE permission_mode END,
              updated_at = NOW()
          WHERE session_id = $1
